use_cases: Hero section headlines with proximity-based character animation on hover
Landing page titles that split and offset characters as users interact
Portfolio or creative agency sites seeking engaging typography effects
Interactive text displays where character movement creates visual depth
Modern web interfaces requiring subtle but distinctive hover animations
ai_summary: A typography animation component that splits each character into two overlapping layers, creating a split-text effect where characters offset based on mouse proximity. Characters nearest to the cursor move furthest apart vertically, with distance-based falloff creating a ripple-like animation. Built with Framer Motion for smooth 300ms transitions between states.
